name: Shadowmoor

draft.notes: Pack is 11 commons, 3 uncommons, a rare, and an ad card. If a foil appears it follows the ad card, displacing a common. Foil odds 1:51 for tournament packs.

sourceNotes: Large set. Printed in USA only (Belgian Shadowmoor unknown). 36 packs per box. Booster has an ad card (counted separately from the 15 game cards). No basic land in booster. Tournament packs described but not modelled.
